title: Mythos is Back, OpenAI Releases GPT 5.6, Apple’s Price Increases
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss recent AI industry news including Anthropic's Mythos model, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release, government regulation of frontier models, and pricing strategies at major tech companies. Topics include model gating effects on open source, cost-optimization trends among frontier lab customers, billing transparency issues, and Apple's price increases.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy run through a batch of AI industry news: Anthropic's Mythos model, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release, government regulation of frontier models, and pricing moves at major tech companies. The discussion connects model gating to its effects on open source, and covers cost-optimization trends among frontier lab customers along with billing transparency issues. Apple's price increases round out the pricing thread.
